ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "cc_num" TEXT /* Credit card number */,
  "trans_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the transaction */,
  "merchant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the merchant */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "amt" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the transaction (e.g., online, offline) */,
  "is_fraud" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the transaction is fraudulent */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of the transaction (e.g., one-time, recurring) */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Information about the device used for the transaction */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_merchant_id FOREIGN KEY ("merchant_id") REFERENCES merchants ("merchant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "merchants" (
  "merchant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each merchant */,
  "merchant_name" TEXT /* Name of the merchant */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the merchant (e.g., grocery, entertainment) */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street address of the merchant */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the merchant */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the merchant */,
  "zip" INTEGER /* Zip code of the merchant */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the merchant location */,
  "long" REAL /* Longitude of the merchant location */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("merchant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip" INTEGER /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the customer location */,
  "long" REAL /* Longitude of the customer location */,
  "job" TEXT /* Job title of the customer */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investigators" (
  "investigator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investigator */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the investigator */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the investigator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the investigator */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the investigator */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the investigator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investigator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction history entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction */,
  "trans_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "amt" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_history_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_history_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fraud_detection" (
  "fraud_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fraud detection entry */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the transaction based on the fraud detection algorithm */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the fraud detection algorithm (e.g., valid, suspicious) */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model used for fraud detection */,
  "features" TEXT /* Features used for fraud detection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fraud_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fraud_detection_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "merchant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the merchant */,
  "investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investigator */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., fraud alert, system update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("investigator_id") REFERENCES investigators ("investigator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_merchant_id FOREIGN KEY ("merchant_id") REFERENCES merchants ("merchant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "merchant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the merchant */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "data" TEXT /* Analytical data (e.g., transaction count, average transaction value) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the analytics data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_merchant_id FOREIGN KEY ("merchant_id") REFERENCES merchants ("merchant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the setting */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the log entry */,
  "level" TEXT /* Level of the log entry (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning model */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the machine learning model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the machine learning model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the machine learning model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)
